Off Calendar Feb-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER DAVID COLCLOUGH'S Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award. Appearances: Daniel A. Gamer, Esq., of the Law Office of Daniel A. Gamer, (415) 472-6655 (appearing thru CourtCall) appearing for Petitioner, David Bradford Colclough, and moving party. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award

MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER DAVID COLCLOUGH'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.
Appearances: Daniel A. Gamer, of Law Office of Daniel A. Gamer, (415) 472-6655, appearing for Petitioner, and moving party (thru Court Call); Kian Amiri, Respondent in Pro Per and opposing party.
